summary: Iteration 5: Testing 4 new features - Clickable Dashboard Stat Cards, Dashboard Analytics Charts, AI Match Page (/ai-match), and College Application Checklist. All backend endpoints exist and are properly auth-protected (8/8 tests pass). Code review confirms all features are correctly implemented.
test_credentials: Google OAuth only - cannot automate full flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 complete. All 4 new features verified: (1) Dashboard stat cards have route property + onClick→navigate(card.route) for Colleges Tracked→/colleges, Emails Sent→/communications, Responses Received→/responses, Response Rate→/responses. (2) Dashboard analytics calls GET /api/dashboard/analytics and renders AreaChart (14-day activity), funnel bar chart (tracked/contacted/replied), and division_breakdown section - data-testid='analytics-section'. (3) AI Match page at /ai-match with data-testid='ai-match-run-btn', handles loading/error/results states, calls GET /api/ai/match. AI Match nav item added to NAV_ITEMS with Sparkles icon. (4) College checklist - CollegeDetailPage fetches GET /api/checklist/{id} and PUT /api/checklist/{id} on toggle, 10 default items, data-testid='checklist-item-{id}'. All backend endpoints return 401 without auth confirming they exist. Full OAuth login required to test authenticated flows.
